blocks.headline: J. Falcon
blocks.subheadline: Software engineer, creator, and builder of things that matter.

blocks.title: About Me
blocks.body: Hi, I'm J. Falcon — a software engineer passionate about building clean, purposeful digital experiences. I work across the full stack with a focus on modern web technologies including Next.js, TypeScript, and cloud platforms. When I'm not writing code, I'm exploring new ideas and pushing projects forward.

blocks.title: Get in Touch
blocks.body: Interested in working together or just want to say hello? Reach out via my GitHub profile or drop me a message — I'd love to connect.
